description: expression evaluator edge cases for error paths

tests.name: entity_in_single_entity_match
tests.description: principal in single entity reference (degrades to ==)
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { principal in User::"alice" };

tests.name: entity_in_single_entity_no_match
tests.description: principal in single entity reference that does not match
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { principal in User::"bob" };

tests.name: action_attr_access_error
tests.description: attribute access on action produces error and denies

tests.name: context_as_entity_error
tests.description: context used as standalone entity produces error and denies
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { context == User::"alice" };

tests.name: in_with_set_match_from_when
tests.description: set membership check with entity values in when clause
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { principal in [User::"alice", User::"bob", User::"charlie"] };
